title: My Love
desc: Raj, a man from a wealthy family, decides if he should marry the daughter of his father's best friend or follows the path of his true love.

title: Naya Daur
desc: When the son of a landlord decides to modernize his business by replacing the horse carts with buses, a horse cart rider decides to challenge him.

title: Azaad Desh Ke Ghulam
desc: When law student Bharti discovers that her father's wealth comes from illegal and immoral activities, she makes a deadly decision to escape that life and draws the attention of a plotting maternal uncle.

title: Ghar Jamai
desc: Dwarka, a millionaire, is impressed by Anil, a principled man, and wants him to marry Mona, his daughter. However, after their marriage, he compels him to move into his house.
